**Kit version** (from the repo root):

```
cat version.json
```

**Doctor output** (config check + live chain smoke + version check, from `app/`):

```
npm run doctor
```

Paste both outputs above — they answer most questions in one shot.

**What happened**

<!-- What you did, what you expected, what you got. Screenshots welcome. -->

**Where**

<!-- Local dev / a built deploy (which host?) / the setup wizard / the /setup studio -->

> Do NOT paste your `.env.local`, RPC key, or any private key. Addresses are fine.
